a_tier_candidate_outcomes.Arborilogical_Services: DEMOTED A→C_watch — deep-dive of /our-qualified-staff/ surfaced Kirbie Houser Pastenes (daughter) as Assistant General Manager + 2 non-founder BCMAs (Peters, Strawn). Internal successor bench established.

platform_acquirer_filters: Bartlett Tree Experts (private, F.A. Bartlett family)
headline_findings: TREE CARE HAS THE HIGHEST FAMILY-SUCCESSION DENSITY OF ANY VERTICAL TESTED — 19 of ~33 long-tenured candidates had visible internal successors (sons, daughters, nephews, spouses). The verifying-no-successor protocol fired correctly and prevented multiple false A-tier promotions.
Zero A-tier promotions — every potential A candidate either had a successor visible on live-fetch or had only license_tenure_proxy age (no OV65 verification in this run).
Top 3 highest-final-score (all B_forward): Artistic Trees / Rene Pina (SA Hill Country, 74), Kriewaldt Tree Care / Mike Kriewaldt (NB, 73), Brent Wester Pro (Beaumont, 70).
Two distress-flag rows: Lindsey Tree Service Dallas (Yelp CLOSED + ECONNREFUSED), Duncan Brooks/Arborist Waco (founder Sr. deceased 2019, son Jr. running operationally complete succession).

PE attention is LOW-MEDIUM as expected: Davey/SavATree/Bartlett all have visible TX corporate footprint but the independent universe is enormous and only modestly consolidated. ETA/searcher appetite is GROWING.
